title: K
sourceNotes: Single-cour anime, 13 episodes. Anime-original story; "K: THE FIRST" is a manga reconstruction of the same TV series storyline, complete at 16 chapters. No official episode-to-chapter guide was found, so the split follows the anime's well-documented two-part structure (murder-mystery setup, then the Colorless/Silver King revelation) with chapter boundaries estimated proportionally — treat as approximate.

mappings.arc: Homra and Scepter 4 / The Shiro Murder Case

movies.title: K: Missing Kings
movies.note: Canon direct sequel film bridging Season 1 to Season 2 (K: Return of Kings).
